sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n94180" key="simi/kion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σιμίκιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n94180.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a musical instrument of thirty-five strings</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:59" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.59</biblScope> </bibl> (<abbr TEIform="abbr">v.l.</abbr> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σιμικόν</orth>).</sense> </entryFree>
